Neovim/Nvim

Final | 26 Oct 2020

Daftar Isi

  • Install Neovim
  • Install vim-plug
  • Referensi

Install Neovim

Ubuntu

sudo apt install neovim

Buat file config

Buat directory untuk config Neovim

mkdir ~/.config/nvim

Create sebuah file init.vim

nvim touch ~/.config/nvim/init.vim

Install vim-plug

sh -c 'curl -fLo "${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}"/nvim/site/autoload/plug.vim --create-dirs \https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junegunn/vim-plug/master/plug.vim'

Referensi

https://www.chrisatmachine.com/Neovim/ https://medium.com/better-programming/setting-up-neovim-for-web-development-in-2020-d800de3efacd https://github.com/junegunn/vim-plug

Final Afriola 2023
